paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘lack of clarity’和‘definition of intelligence’，到原文找表达‘不确定’或‘不知道’智力的句子，找到‘no one knows for certain what it actually is’即匹配。

items.prompt: the point that a researcher’s implicit and explicit theories may be very different

pairs.q: implicit and explicit theories may be very different
pairs.p: little correspondence between the extant implicit and explicit theories
pairs.note: 题干说'可能非常不同'，原文说'几乎没有对应关系'，意思相同。

pairs.q: a researcher’s implicit and explicit theories
pairs.p: the extant implicit and explicit theories
pairs.note: 题干中的'研究者'对应原文中的'现存的'，但核心是内隐和外显理论。

pairs.p: If an investigation of implicit theories reveals
pairs.note: 题干用'观点是'引出，原文用'如果调查显示'引出条件，句式不同但表达同一逻辑。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的'very different'可能被误认为完全相反，但原文是'little correspondence'，表示缺乏一致性，并非完全对立。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'implicit and explicit theories'和'very different'，到原文找'implicit and explicit theories'和表示差异的表达，如'little correspondence'。

questions.title: Questions 4–6
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the claims of the writer in Reading Passage 1?
In boxes 4–6 on your answer sheet, write
YES if the statement agrees with the claims of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the claims of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

items.prompt: Slow language development in children is likely to prove disappointing to their parents.

pairs.note: 题干中的'语言发展'在原文中原词出现，但题干加了'slow'，原文没有提到'slow'。

pairs.q: likely to prove disappointing to their parents
pairs.note: 题干说'让父母失望'，原文说'父母的内隐理论'，两者话题不同，没有直接对应。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'slow language development'和'disappointing'在原文中均未出现，容易误判为NO，但原文未涉及这些内容，应为NOT GIVEN。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'slow language development'和'disappointing parents'，到原文找对应，发现原文只提到'language development'和'parents'，但未提及'slow'或'disappointing'，因此判断为NOT GIVEN。

items.prompt: People’s expectations of what children should gain from education are universal.

pairs.q: People's expectations of what children should gain from education are universal
pairs.p: expectations for children who participate in Western-style schooling are almost certain to be different from those for children who do not participate in such schooling
pairs.note: 题干说期望是普遍的（universal），原文说不同（different），直接否定

paraphrase.trap: 可能误以为题干与原文无关或未提及，但原文明确否定了普遍性
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'universal'，到原文找对应，发现原文说'different'，即期望不同，所以答案为NO

items.prompt: Scholars may discuss theories without fully understanding each other.

pairs.note: 题干说‘讨论理论’，原文具体化为‘讨论外显理论’，属于同义替换。

pairs.p: miss the point of what others are saying
pairs.note: 题干‘没有完全理解彼此’对应原文‘误解对方本意’，是同义替换。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中‘theories’是泛指，原文具体分为‘explicit theories’和‘implicit theories’，但定位句主要讲‘explicit theories’，注意不要被‘implicit theories’干扰。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干核心‘discuss theories’和‘without understanding’，到原文找‘discussing their explicit theories’和‘miss the point’，发现意思一致，故答案为YES。

questions.title: Questions 7–13
instructions: Look at the following statements (Questions 7–13) and the list of theories below.
Match each statement with the correct theory, A, B, or C.
Write the correct letter, A, B, or C, in boxes 7–13 on your answer sheet.
NB You may use any letter more than once.

items.prompt: It is desirable for the same possibilities to be open to everyone.

pairs.q: desirable for the same possibilities to be open to everyone
pairs.note: 题干说‘对所有人开放相同可能性是可取的’，原文说‘人们应当拥有平等机会’，‘same possibilities’替换为‘equal opportunities’，‘open to everyone’替换为‘people should have’

paraphrase.trap: 注意原文后半句说人们未必同等利用或获得同等回报，这与题干‘desirable’（可取）并不矛盾，题干只强调机会平等，不涉及结果。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘same possibilities’和‘open to everyone’，到原文找‘equal opportunities’和‘people should have’，即可定位到B选项对应的句子。

items.prompt: No section of society should have preferential treatment at the expense of another.

pairs.q: No section of society should have preferential treatment at the expense of another.
pairs.note: 题干说'没有哪个社会阶层应该以牺牲另一个为代价获得优待'，原文说'偏袒某一群体而轻视另一群体'，意思相同。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'preferential treatment'和'at the expense of another'，到原文找'favoring one group over another'，这是同义替换。

items.prompt: People should only gain benefits on the basis of what they actually achieve.

pairs.q: only gain benefits on the basis of what they actually achieve
pairs.note: 题干说‘只根据实际成就获得利益’，原文说‘因成就而获得回报’，意思相同。
‘获得利益’对应‘获得回报’。
‘实际成就’对应‘所取得的成就’。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中‘only’强调唯一依据，原文虽未直接出现‘only’，但通过‘if given equal opportunity’和对比低成就者获得较少回报，隐含了按成就分配的原则。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词‘gain benefits’和‘what they achieve’，到原文找‘rewarded’和‘accomplish’，发现同义替换，定位到B选项。

items.prompt: Variation in intelligence begins at birth.

pairs.note: 题干中的'智力差异'对应原文的'不同水平的智力'
题干'始于出生'对应原文'生来具有'

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'begins at birth'可能被误解为'出生时开始变化'，但原文明确说'生来具有不同水平'，强调先天差异。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'Variation in intelligence'和'begins at birth'，到原文找'born with different levels of intelligence'，即可定位到A理论。

items.prompt: The more intelligent people should be in positions of power.

pairs.note: 题干中的'more intelligent people'对应原文中的'the more intelligent'，都是指更聪明的人。

pairs.p: government officials or, in Plato’s term, philosopher-kings
pairs.note: 题干中的'positions of power'被原文具体化为'government officials'和'philosopher-kings'，两者都代表权力职位。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'more intelligent people'和'positions of power'，到原文找对应表达，发现原文提到'the more intelligent'和'government officials/philosopher-kings'，匹配选项A。

items.prompt: Everyone can develop the same abilities.

pairs.q: Everyone can develop the same abilities
pairs.p: all of which can be learned
pairs.note: 题干说'每个人都能发展相同的能力'，原文说'所有专门技能都是可以习得的'，意思相同。

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的'Everyone'可能误导学生去找'everyone'原词，但原文没有，需理解整体意思。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'develop the same abilities'，到原文找表达'可以习得'的对应句。

items.prompt: People of low intelligence are likely to lead uncontrolled lives.

pairs.note: 题干中的'People of low intelligence'对应原文中的'the unintelligent'，都是指智力低下的人。

pairs.p: create, as they always have created, a kind of chaos
pairs.note: 题干说'过不受控制的生活'，原文说'制造混乱'，意思相近，都是指生活无序。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'low intelligence'和'uncontrolled lives'，到原文找同义表达'the unintelligent'和'create...chaos'，即可定位。
